title: Foreign Exchange Turnover Data: April 20, 2026 – April 24, 2026
description: The Reserve Bank of India today released the data showing daily merchant and Inter-Bank transactions in foreign exchange for the period April 20, 2026 – April 24, 2026. All Figures are in USD Millions Position Date MERCHANT INTER BANK FCY / INR FCY / FCY FCY / INR FCY / FCY Spot Forward Cancellation of Forwards Spot Forward Cancellation of Forwards Spot Swap Forward Spot Swap Forward Purchases 20-04-2026 4,253 1,394 1,871 335 565 379 17,499 28,182 1,750 6,992 2,670 367 21-04-2026 6,428 1,8
